decision_legend.list: Field is available from the list/API payload or board listing currently fetched.
decision_legend.detail: Field requires a per-job detail fetch or detail payload.
decision_legend.absent: Field is not available or is not currently preserved by the parser.
decision_legend.inferable: Field is derived from another source field such as URL, title, location, or workplace text.
